testsuite.name: com.aulms.artifact.ArtifactValidationApiContractTest

testcase.name: sql mapper validates db columns and parameters()
review pr endpoint aggregates file validation results()
review ddl endpoint returns artifact validation issues()
ddl CUST_ID column returns CUST_NO error()
review code endpoint infers kotlin source and returns artifact validation issues()
review openapi endpoint returns artifact validation issues()
test sentence customer ID recommends customer number()
